MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-13-2017 IN 206, DEFENDANT BAY ONE SECURITY,INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. DAVID RAND APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF GERMAN MOTORS CORP. PHILIP WERNER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF FEDERAL MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY. G. NOEL KIDD APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS BAY ONE SECURITY AND PABLO C. LOPEZ. THE COURT HEARS THE MOTION, NOTWHITHSTANDING OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH S.F. LOCAL RULES 2.7(B) AND 2.11(T), PROVIDING COURTESY COPIES TO THE COURT. THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/31/17 IS VACATED AND MATTER IS SET FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON 12/13/17 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610 FOR STATUS OF DECLARATORY RELIEF ACTION TO BE FILED. DISCOVERY IS RE-OPENED AND THE ORIGINAL DISCOVERY DEADLINE THAT WAS TIED TO THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/31/17 IS VACATED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
